chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 994 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 12.09.2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. On 06.07.2023, Counsel for the Petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this Petition in view of the judgment passed by Honourable Supreme Court on 09.11.2015 in Civil Appeals No.19-K to 50-K of 2015. Thereafter no one has turned up to pursue this Petition diligently. From perusal of prayer clause, it reflects that the Petitioner is seeking his appointment on the basis of donation of plot, whereas, the said Policy has been set aside by the Honourable Supreme Court. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
